deep_dive.title: FT-Pilot: Automated Fault-Tolerant RTL Rewriting via Vulnerability-Guided LLMs
deep_dive.abstract: As integrated circuit technologies continue to scale toward advanced process nodes, the continual reduction in node capacitance and supply voltage has made digital systems increasingly vulnerable to soft errors. Although traditional full-chip hardening methods can improve reliability, they often incur unacceptable area and power overhead, making selective hardening a more practical engineering solution. However, existing approaches typically rely on time-consuming fault-injection simulation to determine hardening locations through vulnerability analysis, and still depend heavily on manual strategy selection and RTL modification during the hardening stage, making them ill-suited for efficient automated reliability optimization at early design stages. To address these challenges, this paper proposes FT-Pilot, a GNN-guided LLM framework for automatic RTL soft-error hardening. The framework first employs a GNN to identify critical vulnerable assets directly at the RTL level, and then introduces an LLM-driven rewriting engine composed of an analyzer and a rewriter, which performs RTL-level fault-tolerant code rewriting with the support of dual-knowledge-base retrieval-augmented generation and an automatic repair mechanism. Experimental results show that the proposed framework can automatically generate hardened RTL designs that are syntactically correct, functionally correct, and synthesizable across multiple benchmark circuits, while significantly reducing output error rates under soft-error scenarios. This work provides a practical automated path toward shift-left reliability optimization at the RTL level.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: LLM for automated RTL rewriting and fault tolerance verification
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 利用LLM自动化RTL重写以提升容错性
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 利用LLM自动化RTL重写以提升容错性
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 利用LLM自动化RTL重写以提升容错性
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: FT-Pilot uses vulnerability-guided LLMs to automatically rewrite RTL for fault tolerance, reducing manual effort in selective hardening against soft errors.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 随着芯片工艺微缩，软错误威胁加剧，传统全芯片加固方法开销过大。本文提出FT-Pilot框架，利用漏洞引导的大语言模型自动重写RTL代码，实现选择性容错加固。该方法通过漏洞分析确定关键位置，并由LLM自动生成修正代码。实验表明，该框架能有效提升芯片可靠性，同时大幅降低人工成本和设计开销，为LLM在硬件验证与优化中的应用提供了新路径。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 随着芯片工艺微缩，软错误威胁加剧，传统全芯片加固方法开销过大。本文提出FT-Pilot框架，利用漏洞引导的大语言模型自动重写RTL代码，实现选择性容错加固。该方法通过漏洞分析确定关键位置，并由LLM自动生成修正代码。实验表明，该框架能有效提升芯片可靠性，同时大幅降低人工成本和设计开销，为LLM在硬件验证与优化中的应用提供了新路径。
deep_dive.matched_query_text: large language model for hardware formal verification

deep_dive.title: From Rocq to Metal: A Pipeline for Formally Verified Microcontroller Firmware
deep_dive.abstract: Enforcing invariants in safety-critical systems is increasingly urgent as AI-generated code becomes widespread. Unfortunately, the runtimes required to support high-level specification languages are too large for most embedded targets. In this article, we show how formally verified firmware is achievable today. We built Encore!, a bare-metal Continuation Passing Style (CPS) virtual machine (VM) that runs Rocq-extracted Scheme on microcontrollers. We also show how to structure firmware as a pure state-transition function, making its core fully provable in Rocq while keeping the unverified host layer constant regardless of firmware complexity. Large Language Model (LLM)-assisted tactic synthesis fits naturally into this workflow: formal theorem statements replace manual code review, allowing AI-generated firmware to prove itself.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: LLM-assisted tactic synthesis for formally verified microcontroller firmware
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: LLM辅助策略合成用于形式验证的微控制器固件
deep_dive.llm_evidence: LLM辅助策略合成用于形式验证的微控制器固件
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: LLM辅助策略合成用于形式验证的微控制器固件
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: From Rocq to Metal presents a pipeline for formally verified microcontroller firmware using LLM-assisted tactic synthesis and a bare-metal CPS VM.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 安全关键系统中的形式验证需要高效运行环境，但现有高级规范语言运行时过大。本文提出Encore!，一个裸机CPS虚拟机和形式验证流水线，可将Rocq提取的Scheme代码运行于微控制器上。固件被构造为纯状态转换函数，核心可在Rocq中完全证明，同时LLM辅助策略合成自然融入工作流。该方法使得AI生成的代码也能获得形式保证，为硬件级固件验证提供了可行路径。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 安全关键系统中的形式验证需要高效运行环境，但现有高级规范语言运行时过大。本文提出Encore!，一个裸机CPS虚拟机和形式验证流水线，可将Rocq提取的Scheme代码运行于微控制器上。固件被构造为纯状态转换函数，核心可在Rocq中完全证明，同时LLM辅助策略合成自然融入工作流。该方法使得AI生成的代码也能获得形式保证，为硬件级固件验证提供了可行路径。
deep_dive.matched_query_text: Can LLMs assist in model checking and theorem proving for hardware design?

quick_skim.title: FVSpec: Real-World Property-Based Tests as Lean Challenges
quick_skim.abstract: We present a benchmark for evaluating AI models and agents on real-world formal software verification tasks. We first scrape 11,039 property-based tests (PBTs) from real-world Python repositories, then automatically translate 2,772 of them (25%) into 9,415 Lean 4 specifications with sorry placeholders (about 3 formalizations/PBT; we retain multiple attempts when none dominates on quality metrics). Translating PBTs into Lean specifications is challenging: it requires modeling Python semantics in Lean, inferring the logical property encoded in an imperative PBT, and handling the inherent difficulties of dependently-typed programming in a seldom-used language. We describe a three-agent LLM pipeline for transpiling PBTs into Lean specifications, evaluate coverage and quality metrics, and provide baselines for proof generation using several automated and model based approaches. All code (scraper and agents) and data (PBTs and Lean specifications) are open source. Our benchmark aims to drive progress on the underexplored problem of AI-assisted formal verification of real-world software, which is of increasing interest as AI produces more and more of the world's code.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: LLM pipeline for translating property-based tests to Lean specifications for formal verification
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 使用LLM管道将基于属性的测试转换为Lean规范用于形式验证
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 使用LLM管道将基于属性的测试转换为Lean规范用于形式验证
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 使用LLM管道将基于属性的测试转换为Lean规范用于形式验证
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: Introduces FVSpec, a benchmark of real-world property-based tests translated into Lean specifications via a three-agent LLM pipeline, evaluating AI on formal verification.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 该论文构建了FVSpec基准，从真实Python项目提取基于属性的测试，并通过三代理LLM管道自动转换为Lean形式规范。该工作评估了LLM在形式验证上的能力，尽管面向软件，但方法论直接支持LLM辅助硬件形式验证的研究。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 该论文构建了FVSpec基准，从真实Python项目提取基于属性的测试，并通过三代理LLM管道自动转换为Lean形式规范。该工作评估了LLM在形式验证上的能力，尽管面向软件，但方法论直接支持LLM辅助硬件形式验证的研究。
quick_skim.matched_query_text: Papers central to 搜索关于大语言模型在硬件形式验证中应用的论文。, especially work that connects or combines: large language model for hardware formal verification; hardware formal verification using large language models; RTL verification with LLMs; What are the latest advances in applying LLMs to formal verification of RTL designs?; Can LLMs assist in model checking and theorem proving for hardware design?.
